title: 국회, 기본소득법 재논의 시작
summary: 국회 기본소득 특별위원회가 논란이 되었던 기본소득법을 재심의하기 시작했습니다.
content: The National Assembly special committee resumed discussions on basic income law. Previous sessions ended without consensus among parties. Ruling party advocates for gradual implementation approach. Opposition pushes for more comprehensive coverage. Financial impact studies are being reviewed by committee members. Public opinion surveys show divided support. Expert testimonies are scheduled for next week. Regional pilot programs have shown mixed results. Tax reform proposals accompany the basic income bill. International case studies are being examined. Final vote timing remains uncertain.
